hero.subtitle: At Lizza X, we build high-performance digital products. Specialized in native and hybrid mobile development, AI architecture consulting, cloud infrastructure, and tech talent training.

about.title: The Engineer Behind the X
about.subtitle: Gustavo Lizárraga, founder of Lizza X.
about.founder_role: Founder, Systems and Computer Science Engineer, Software Architect & DevRel
about.bio_p1: Hi, I'm Gustavo Lizárraga, Systems and Computer Science Engineer. I founded Lizza X with a clear mission: to build exceptional software, foster vibrant technology communities, and train the next generation of engineers for the international market.
about.bio_p2: With over 13 years of experience in the mobile development and cloud systems ecosystem, I have worked as a software engineer, consultant, university professor, international speaker, and online instructor. My approach combines the technical rigor of SOLID principles and clean architecture with the dynamism of Artificial Intelligence and Developer Relations (DevRel) strategies.
about.volunteerSubtitle: My participation and leadership in global technology programs.

experience.title: My Professional Journey
experience.subtitle: Discover the key milestones of my career divided into my three major areas of impact.

devJobs.desc: Technical leadership in designing robust mobile architectures (Kotlin Multiplatform, Swift, Flutter) and building advanced AI solutions for the international market.

Delivered 35+ high-performance Android & iOS apps (Kotlin, Swift, Flutter, React Native). Engineered 'yoreportoBolivia' (national election app, 40k+ daily reports) and a Pilot Logbook app for Amaszonas airline.
Built core Android modules for major U.S. retail clients, integrated RFID readers and Bluetooth devices with ViZix and RIoT platforms, and improved inventory tracking systems.

teachJobs.desc: Authoring highly technical eBooks, Android/Flutter articles, courses, and structured learning paths for global developer audiences.
Delivering specialized Kotlin/Android trainings, managing community platforms, hosting webinars, and growing a tech community of 10k+ developers.
Created recorded and live training programs for corporate clients on Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Multiplatform, SwiftUI, Clean Architecture, and AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor AI).

teachJobs.company: Cognos, Franz Tamayo University, UMSA PGI
teachJobs.desc: Taught 25+ certified courses for ATC International Certification. Lectured on Software Engineering, advanced mobile development, and postgraduate Java/Android courses.

communityJobs.company: Kotlin La Paz & GDG Android Bolivia
communityJobs.desc: Founder of Kotlin La Paz and GDG Android Bolivia. Organizer of mDevConf (Bolivia's largest mobile dev event). Hosted over 250+ events, 125+ talks, and 50+ workshops impacting 15k+ developers worldwide.
Wrote comprehensive technical guides and tutorials for Android (Kotlin/Java) push notifications, simplifying developer onboarding and SDK adoption.
Creating technical content, blogs, newsletter resources, and short/long-form videos on YouTube and TikTok, scaling educational impact to over 10k subscribers.

volunteer.desc: Student leadership and open-source culture evangelist within academic institutions, organizing workshops on Git, GitHub, and contribution best practices.
Security advocate focusing on identity management, authentication best practices, and secure user flows through talks and technical workshops.
Organizing and speaking at official Google developer events covering Android, Flutter, Firebase, and Google Cloud Platform.
